volume

volume liters

This command schedules, at the current simulation time, an event setting the simulation volume. The unit of volume is fixed as "liters" so that reaction rates may be expressed in molar units.

This command does not instantly reset the volume; it only schedules an event that does so. This is so that reactions can be rescheduled in response to the volume change. Using the command 

run 0.0

will cause the scheduled volume change actually to occur, so that the volume is reset, but will not proceed to a later simulation time.
